ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city above sea level */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the city (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "time_zone_offset" TEXT /* UTC offset for the city's timezone */,
  "nearest_station" TEXT /* Name of the nearest weather station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measurement in degrees Celsius */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to collect the data (e.g., ground-based sensor, satellite imagery) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data accuracy */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of data collection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the data source (e.g., coordinates, address) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the data source provider */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the collection method */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Spatial or temporal resolution of the data collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the method details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collection method (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the factor is recorded */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the environmental factor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the factor was recorded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environmental factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_weather" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical weather record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature on the date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity on the date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed on the date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation on the date */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure on the date */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction on the date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical weather record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_weather_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the data quality issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data quality report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)
